queries.question: What day did Health Matters debut?
queries.sql: SELECT Debut_Day FROM Podcast WHERE Title = 'Health Matters'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?debut_day WHERE {
  ?podcast a :Podcast .
  ?podcast p:Debut_Day ?debut_day .
  ?podcast p:Title ?title_f .
  FILTER(STR(?title_f) = STR("Health Matters"))
}

queries.question: What day did the podcast that Bob subscribed to debut?
queries.sql: SELECT Debut_Day FROM Podcast JOIN Subscription ON Subscription.Podcast_id = Podcast.id JOIN Subscriber ON Subscription.Subscriber_id = Subscriber.id WHERE email  LIKE '%bob%'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?debut_day WHERE {
  ?podcast a :Podcast .
  ?subscription a :Subscription .
  ?subscription p:hasPodcast ?podcast .
  ?subscriber a :Subscribers .
  ?subscription p:hasSubscriber ?subscriber .
  ?podcast p:Debut_Day ?debut_day .
  ?subscriber p:email ?email_lk .
  FILTER(REGEX(STR(?email_lk), "^.*bob.*$"))
}

  ?subscription p:hasSubscriber ?subscriber .

  ?podcast p:Debut_Year ?debut_year .

When did the podcast that Bob subscribed to come out?
